title: toxocarpus maritimus
intro: Toxocarpus maritimus, also known as the salt bush or saltwort, is a succulent shrub that belongs to the Aizoaceae family. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Toxocarpus maritimus include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. The herbal preparations of Toxocarpus maritimus typically involve making teas or infusions from the leaves and stems, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
